note_comments.description: This demo requires Run() to be called to start the event loop
LoadImageFromReader is available for loading images from any io.Reader.
In a real app, you'd call app.Run() here to start the event loop.
applyToTheme is private, so we can't demonstrate it here.
We're not running the full app event loop since this is just a theme demo
This creates a slice that points to mmap'd memory
Go manages the memory for s.Data slice
Our socket implementation doesn't buffer, so this is a no-op.
The interface name is sent as a string in the bind request.
This does not free the underlying shared memory in the pool.
conn.File() creates a duplicate fd, which we use for low-level syscalls.
baseEvent would need to be queried from connection,
Custom font loading from TTF files is not yet implemented.
Custom font loading from TTF files is not yet implemented.
